programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Right when Angie is starting to succeed in Dr. Now's program, her marriage falls apart and her life is thrown into chaos, but she tries to move ahead alone despite dire difficulties.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Right when Angie starts to succeed in Dr. Now's program, her marriage falls apart and her life is thrown into chaos; Angie moves ahead despite dire difficulties, but when her body starts to break down, Angie fears the worst and faces it alone.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Jeanne struggles to care for herself in the aftermath of her dad's death; Brandon strives to get his weight down to feel confident when proposing to his girlfriend, Tayler, and be the man she deserves.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life
programme.desc: Holly already has one failed weight loss surgery, so to succeed this time, she must do more than change her eating habits, she must address the childhood issues that continue to plague her.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life
programme.desc: Nikki finds her career as a costume designer threatened by immobility, so she undergoes gastric bypass and confronts the emotional causes for her eating.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life
programme.desc: Ashley confronts medical setbacks and struggles to get past the trauma that ignited her eating disorder.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life
programme.desc: Kelly is on the verge of immobility when she decides to make the trip to Houston to visit Dr. Now; her journey gets off to a painful start when a long travel-day grows longer as Kelly gets stuck in a cab on her way from the clinic to the hospital.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life
programme.desc: John and Lonnie are two brothers from opposite ends of the spectrum; estranged for years, the brothers are now brought together by a common need to lose weight while they still can.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life
programme.desc: Seana is 23 and nearly 700 lbs, living at her mom's house, depressed and anxious, her weight-gain threatening to take her last breath; Dr. Now can give her the tools she needs to live, but until she chooses life, no one can save Seana but herself.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life
programme.desc: At 600 pounds, Ashley has to move home so her mom can help her care for herself and her newborn daughter; Ashley must overcome a lifetime's worth of unfortunate circumstances and get Dr. Now's help in Houston.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life
programme.desc: Shannon's husband loves her the way she is, but that may not help because she's 700 pounds and bedridden; Dr. Now knows it's not easy to break a toxic cycle of overfeeding and enabling, but that's what needs to happen if Shannon wants to live.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life
programme.desc: Irene had to move back in with her son because her weight made it unbearable to live on her own. When Dr. Now can't get through to her, the only thing that might help her break the cycle is a once-in-a-lifetime turn of events.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life
programme.desc: Through tough times, food has always been Tammy's friend; now she has gotten so big that her daughters and mother have moved home to care for her, and unless Dr. Now can get her to confront her grief, food might be her killer.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me
programme.desc: Dr. Schaeffer, Dr. Haller and Dr. Vincent deck the halls and hang the mistletoes while spreading holiday cheer and treating shocking new cases.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me
programme.desc: A woman with a 2-pound mass in her foot; a man with pasta-shaped toenails; a woman with heels like rocks has the doctors scratching their heads and holding their noses.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me
programme.desc: Cindy is desperate to have Dr. Brad fix her stumpy foot; Gregory has open wounds on both feet and hopes Dr. Ebonie can heal them; Glen's feet are split down the middle, and Dr. Brad is determined to find a solution to ease his pain.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Sin City ER
programme.desc: A shootout leaves a police officer clinging to life; a cowboy and cupid help a she-devil in distress; a zip-line guide falls 80 feet to the canyon floor.

programme.title: Sin City ER
programme.sub-title: Urgent Care, Taxi Scare & Hidden Where?
programme.desc: Doctors retrieve a stolen Rolex from a very private spot; a pick-up turns deadly when a cabbie is shot multiple times; a dirt-bike accident in the desert leaves a 52-year-old thrill-seeker clinging to life.

programme.title: Sin City ER
programme.desc: A brutal assault could end a star athlete's career, a 28-year-old man is hit in the head by a flying baseball bat; and a Vegas chef falls asleep with a loaded gun.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the E.R.
programme.desc: A patient appears to be hallucinating and sends ER staff on a wild goose chase; a new nurse makes a shocking mistake; doctors try to help a former EMT who is found lethargic and slurring his words.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Untold Stories of the E.R.
programme.desc: A surfer is impaled between the legs; a football player's severe leg pain leads to an unexpected diagnosis; a woman is given a clot-busting drug to cure her stroke, but she has another condition that could cause that same drug to kill her.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Untold Stories of the E.R.
programme.desc: A boa constrictor has wrapped around a man's arm and won't let go; a young woman has a severe laceration, but doctors begin to suspect there may be more to her case than the injury; a young man goes into anaphylactic shock after a dinner out.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Untold Stories of the E.R.
programme.desc: An urgent care physician must think outside the box to care for two emergencies at once; a woman with abdominal pain receives an unexpected diagnosis; a yoga instructor has a dangerously high temperature for no obvious reason.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Untold Stories of the E.R.
programme.desc: A patient gets brought in with a live shark clamped onto his thigh, and he wants to save the shark; complications arise for a woman with a life-threatening condition; a mysterious condition causes a man to pass out.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Detroit ER
programme.desc: Staff treats patient injured while engaging in risky behavior at night.

programme.title: Detroit ER
programme.desc: Medical staff treats a patient who was hit by a train while crossing the tracks.

programme.title: Detroit ER
programme.desc: Medical staff treats patient injured in a car wreck involving multiple vehicles.

programme.title: About Face
programme.desc: Dr. Roostaeian treats a man with a giant crater in his face left by a tumor; Dr. Panossian operates on a patient who's unable to close her eye and is at risk of losing her sight.

programme.title: About Face
programme.desc: The team treats a woman with a dog bite; Dr. Panossian and Dr. Rovelo remove hundreds of tumors from a woman's face.

programme.title: About Face
programme.desc: When faced with treating a man whose cheek is about to pop due to a 4lb tumor, Dr. Panossian worries it could become a deadly situation; a woman whose lower lip won't stop growing turns to Dr. Rovelo for help.

programme.title: About Face
programme.desc: Dr. Roostaeian wants to help a young woman living with the largest birthmark he's ever seen, however, surgery could be life-threatening; after being hit by a drunk driver, Dr. Rovelo's patient hasn't been able to close his mouth.
